APP-001.name: Priya Sharma
APP-001.notes: Clean applicant. No tax flags. Standard subsidy loan candidate.

APP-002.name: Rajan Mehta
APP-002.notes: Flagged applicant. Unresolved 2-year tax dispute on record.

APP-003.name: Aisha Verma
APP-003.notes: Flagged applicant with guarantor: Suresh Verma. Guarantor offsets risk veto.

APP-004.name: Mohan Das
APP-004.notes: Rural applicant. Triggers insufficient-fund scenario (≤5000 available).

APP-005.name: Kavya Nair
APP-005.notes: Emergency payout applicant. Routed A->C. Targets frozen fund to force human-review path.

APP-006.name: Vikram Singh
APP-006.notes: Clean applicant but requests 40k against 15k income (> 1.5x), triggering High ratio proportionality judgment.

subsidy_loan.description: Standard subsidy loan — serial flow A->B->C.

emergency_payout.description: Emergency/disaster bypass — routed A->C, targets frozen fund to force human review.

adversarial_threshold_dodge.description: Adversarial: amount just under ₹50,000 autonomous threshold. Validator must still catch human-review if set.

adversarial_round_cap.description: Adversarial: insufficient fund forces repeated PARTIAL responses, exhausting the round cap and escalating to human review.
